pageContext.name: Pop Up Parade Mitsuri Kanroji
pageContext.description: The Love Hashira of the Demon Slayer Corps, Mitsuri Kanroji.  POP UP PARADE is a series of figures that are easy to collect with affordable prices and speedy releases! Each figure typically stands around 17-18cm in height and the series features a vast selection of characters from popular anime and game series, with many more to be added soon! From Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba comes the POP UP PARADE Mitsuri Kanroji Collectible Figure, the Love Hashira of the Demon Slayer Corps! Be sure to welcome her sweet smiling face to your Demon Slayer collection!
